pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 17, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it triggers deprecation warnings and will cause compilation errors in future JDK versions.
